sentences.translation: Gospodin Yasir je stigao u hotel.
sentences.translationEn: Mr. Yasir arrived at the hotel.
He went to the reception desk.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّهُ حَجَزَ غُرْفَةً لِثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je da je rezervisao sobu na tri dana.
sentences.translationEn: He said he booked a room for three days.

sentences.translation: Službenik mu je dao ključ sobe.
sentences.translationEn: The employee gave him the room key.
